title: bridge-jmap atomically correct: mark-seen only after successful enqueue
description: bridge-jmap/src/bridge.rs polling loop: seen_ids.insert(email.id) is called only after tx.try_send(nie_text).is_ok(). If the channel is full, the id is NOT marked seen and will be retried on the next poll. This is the correct design — a drop at channel capacity gets a free retry. A future contributor might 'simplify' by marking seen before send; that would cause silent message loss on channel-full drops.
